description: On-demand pricing for the baseline benchmark hardware. This is the cost profile the benchmark-result example's cost block references (cost-g5-xlarge-ondemand @ 0.1.0). Prices are volatile (as of 2026-07 — re-verify at use time).

provenance.source: AWS EC2 on-demand pricing page, g5.xlarge, us-east-1
provenance.notes: as of 2026-07 — re-verify at use time
explicit planning assumption (~40% of on-demand, typical G5 spot discount band); NOT a quoted price — spot prices float. Re-price from the spot feed before any decision uses this number.

rates.notes: spot preemption risk is not priced in; capacity recommendations using this rate must carry the preemption assumption explicitly
